overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Star Wars game showing a female character walking through an alien savanna at dusk with a small companion creature. The environment transitions from open grassland with rocky outcrops to a settlement featuring glowing green fences and a large creature in a pen, all under a pink sky with a giant red planet visible.

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open alien savanna at dusk, with rocky outcrops visible in the distance and tall grass swaying beside the dirt path. A small companion creature follows behind as they traverse the empty grassland under a pink sky.

distant buildings and structures of a settlement becoming visible

segments.scene_description: As the character continues walking, a massive red planet rises into view on the right horizon, casting an orange glow. The rocky outcrops fall behind as distant settlement structures become visible ahead, marking the transition from wilderness to inhabited territory.

segments.scene_description: The character enters a settlement marked by glowing green fence barriers lining the dirt path. Metal barrels and small huts appear along the route as the giant red planet shifts to the center of the sky. The character approaches a large pen containing a massive creature, illuminated by the green glowing fences.

scene_state.functional_zone: creature pen with large contained animal

events.description: large horned creature in pen becomes clearly visible as character approaches

agents.ego_description: pausing briefly to observe the large creature in the glowing pen before continuing down the settlement path

notable_agents.action: large horned creature resting inside the glowing green pen enclosure

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the creature pen, revealing a large horned animal resting within the glowing green enclosure. After observing the creature, the character continues past the pen and proceeds deeper into the settlement, with the giant red planet still visible in the purple sky behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an alien savanna at dusk that gradually transitions from an empty wilderness into a glowing settlement. It begins with the character and a small companion traversing a dirt path through swaying tall grass and rocky outcrops under a pink sky. As they advance, a massive red planet rises on the horizon to cast an orange glow, shifting the landscape from open grassland toward the first signs of distant structures. The scene then opens into a settlement where the path is lined with metal barrels, small huts, and glowing green fence barriers, while the giant planet moves to the center of the sky. Finally, the camera passes a large horned animal resting within a glowing enclosure before proceeding deeper into the outpost under a deepening purple sky.
